targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

params.fee: Fuzzed fee amount bounded between minFee and 10 ether

testFuzz_requestProof_anyFeeAboveMin(uin.notice: Any fee at or above minFee should create a valid request

test_assignProver_revertsIfProverNotActi.notice: Cannot assign an inactive / unregistered prover

test_assignProver_success().notice: Operator can assign an active prover to a pending request

test_constructor_revertsOnZeroAddress().notice: Constructor must revert with ZeroAddress if any address parameter is zero

test_constructor_setsImmutables().notice: Verify that the constructor sets all immutables and mutable state correctly

test_registerCircuit_revertsIfAlreadyReg.notice: Cannot register a circuit that already has a non-zero vkHash

test_registerCircuit_revertsIfNotOperato.notice: A non-operator address cannot register circuits

test_registerCircuit_success().notice: Operator can register a new circuit with valid circuitId and vkHash

test_requestProof_revertsIfInsufficientF.notice: Request reverts if fee is below minFee

test_requestProof_revertsIfInvalidCircui.notice: Request reverts if the circuitId is not registered

test_requestProof_revertsIfInvalidDeadli.notice: Request reverts if deadline is not in the future

test_requestProof_success().notice: Successfully create a proof request and verify struct fields + event

test_setMinFee_success().notice: Operator can update the minimum fee

test_setOperator_success().notice: Operator can transfer operator role to a new address

test_submitProof_failure().notice: Verification failure: mock verify returns 0x00, status should be Failed,         no fee transfer to prover

test_submitProof_revertsIfExpired().notice: Cannot submit a proof after the request deadline has passed

test_submitProof_revertsIfNotAssignedPro.notice: Only the assigned prover can submit a proof, not a different prover

test_submitProof_success().notice: Full happy path: request -> assign -> mock precompiles -> submit         Verifies status=Verified, fee transferred to prover, and events emitted
